counters.description: irelia can't be killed but you should easily neutralize and outscale. you can w to immune her e stun, post 6 you can use w to reflect her ult. as long as you save e defensively and don't push the wave you should be fine. if you push too far up in the lane without cds available she will run you down.

orianna is a pretty difficult matchup for mel, there isn't a good ability to w and she has very low cds. try and dodge as many qs as you can early in the lane and avoid taking too much damage. hold e defensively so she can't chase. after you get chapter + more levels you can look to either neutralize waveclear or q spam to harass. if you can w her ult you should be fine.

viktor stat checks you pretty hard early, the best thing to do is try and neutralize/farm from range. eventually you will have enough/mana low cds to neutralize but there isn't much that can be done aggressively. make sure you have w available to get out of his w (using the ms) so you don't get ulted at 6.

synergies.description: mel is really good with ad cc junglers, especially ones that are tankier.

mel can duo ap but she prefers solo. if you do play with an ap jungler probably don't go for a flat pen build and instead play for dps.

tempo junglers are solid with mel, you can good lane pressure as well as cc of your own so you can easily support their skirmishing and invades.
